title: Webpage Views With Photos

posts.author: jackjack2202 (Jack Kubicek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

Im doing my first workflow project that heavily depends on the ability to share monday.com boards via a url to external non monday.com users such as clients.

One requirement we have is the ability to share images along with items. To the looks of things when I have an image column it appears within the shared link however it is not possible to view any of the images. Not sure if im missing something or I need to enable a setting.

When working with filters I came to realize only the old style filters will work with a web view so im not sure if its something wacky like that. Please let me know your thoughts.
